name: golf-charity-platform
description: Golf Charity Subscription Platform - Golf, Charity & Community

scripts.dev: start cmd /k "cd api && npm run dev" && start cmd /k "cd web && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd api && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.build: cd web && npm install && npm run build && cd ../api && npm install && npm run build
